scripts.verify: npm run goal:audit && npm run ios:verify-model && npm run ios:verify-events && npm run concept:audit && npm run supabase:verify && npm run build
scripts.ios:build: xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath ios/App/build-native CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:offline-recognition: ios/qa-check-events.sh && npm run ios:build && env QA_INTERACTION_SUITES=offline ios/qa-interactions.sh
scripts.supabase:verify: npm run supabase:test && deno check supabase/functions/identify-species/index.ts && supabase --version && bash -n supabase/deploy.sh && node scripts/verify-supabase-deploy.mjs
